about.title: About CheckReel
about.content:
CheckReel is a flagship service of Alwafer Media — a full-stack studio delivering end-to-end social account management, AI-powered websites & mobile apps, and data-driven marketing campaigns.

What you get: instant media checks, simple fix-guides, and a 3-item free trial to prove the value.
Why it matters: clean content protects your brand, avoids takedowns, and saves hours every week.
